title: Fiery Roasted Korean Beef Skewers
description: A spicy and flavorful Korean-inspired dish featuring roasted beef skewers, perfect for a dinner or snack. The gochugaru adds a bold and fiery flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together gochugaru, coconut aminos, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions if desired.
